## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make smoke` passes (if `resolve.lua` / `inject.lua` / `encryption.lua` changed)
- [ ] README / `doc/chezmoi-template.txt` updated (if config surface or commands changed)
- [ ] AI assistance disclosed (if any) — see [CONTRIBUTING](CONTRIBUTING.md)
